texto: We in the Middle East like to talk politics, we like to argue. Just look at the three prophets - Moses, Jesus and Mohammad. They are all from this small region which creates problems all the time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “We in the Middle East like to talk politics, we like to argue. Just look at the three prophets - …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, time, problems pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de problems e small.

texto: I really don't want you to think of Qatar as a hydrocarbon country alone. We know that hydrocarbons will come and go. But education will stay. It is the most important thing for us.
